overview: Based on the published agenda, this special Village Board meeting was scheduled to convene in closed session to interview a Community Development Director candidate and consider related employment matters. The meeting was set for June 9, 2026, at the Kronenwetter Municipal Center.

agenda.item: Closed session pursuant to Wis. Stat. 19.85(1)(c) for consideration of employment, promotion, compensation or performance evaluation data of any public employee - Interviewing Community Development Director Candidate

discussions.item: Closed Session - Community Development Director Candidate Interview
discussions.body: The board was scheduled to convene in closed session to interview a Community Development Director candidate and consider related employment matters including potential promotion, compensation, and performance evaluation data. The closed session was authorized under Wisconsin Statute 19.85(1)(c) for matters involving public employee personnel decisions.

Following reconvention in open session, the board was scheduled to take action on matters discussed during the closed session, though the specific nature of such action was not detailed on the agenda.

actionItems: Scheduled to interview Community Development Director candidate in closed session
Expected to reconvene in open session and consider action items
title: Special Village Board Meeting - 2026-06-09
